description: Source-timestamped energy data and reviewed OilPriceAPI product facts for MCP clients.
name: io.github.OilpriceAPI/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your OilPriceAPI key from oilpriceapi.com/signup. Optional: without it, keyless demo mode.
environmentVariables.name: OILPRICEAPI_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Tool scope: read (default) or write (explicit mutation opt-in).
environmentVariables.name: OILPRICEAPI_MCP_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Tool profile: all, core, market, or automation.
environmentVariables.name: OILPRICEAPI_MCP_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist (core, market, automation) that overrides the profile.
environmentVariables.name: OILPRICEAPI_MCP_CATEGORIES
